items.title: Jaylin Williams on Jared McCain: "When he first got on the team, I asked everybody, 'Is this how y'all see me?' In any situation, after a win or a loss, he's going to be smiling. He's going to be dancing. He's going to play his Olivia Dean in the shower, and you can hear him singing in the showers."
items.author: refreshing_yogurt

items.title: Jaylin Williams on being referred to as ‘The Other Jaylin Williams’: “I’m not seeking approval from anybody… I’ve been called way worse in the last 12 hours.”

items.title: Pretty sure those "flopper" chants late in first half were directed at Shai, which is a shame, because Jaylin Williams drew the foul, and chanting that at him would have been about the most ball-knowing thing I've ever seen from an opposing crowd.
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt: Pretty sure those "flopper" chants late in first half were directed at Shai, which is a shame, because Jaylin Williams drew the foul, and chanting that at him would have been about the most ball-knowing thing I've ever seen from an opposing crowd.
